original_query: WITH item_avg AS ( SELECT i_item_sk, 1.3 * AVG(cs_ext_discount_amt) AS avg_discount FROM catalog_sales JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk WHERE i_manufact_id = 269 AND d_date BETWEEN '1998-03-18' AND ('1998-03-18'::date + INTERVAL '90 days') GROUP BY i_item_sk) SELECT SUM(cs.cs_ext_discount_amt)  FROM catalog_sales cs JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk JOIN date_dim ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk JOIN item_avg ON i.i_item_sk = item_avg.i_item_sk WHERE i.i_manufact_id = 269 AND d_date BETWEEN '1998-03-18' AND ('1998-03-18'::date + INTERVAL '90 days') AND cs.cs_ext_discount_amt >  item_avg.avg_discount LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
/*+ NO_MATERIALIZE(item_avg) HashJoin(cs i) HashJoin(cs date_dim) */
WITH item_avg AS (  SELECT i_item_sk, 1.3 * AVG(cs_ext_discount_amt) AS avg_discount FROM catalog_sales JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk WHERE i_manufact_id = 269 AND d_date BETWEEN '1998-03-18' AND ('1998-03-18'::date + INTERVAL '90 days') GROUP BY i_item_sk) SELECT SUM(cs.cs_ext_discount_amt)  FROM catalog_sales cs JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk JOIN date_dim ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk JOIN item_avg ON i.i_item_sk = item_avg.i_item_sk WHERE i.i_manufact_id = 269 AND d_date BETWEEN '1998-03-18' AND ('1998-03-18'::date + INTERVAL '90 days') AND cs.cs_ext_discount_amt >  item_avg.avg_discount LIMIT 100;
